title: Jentorra
content:
{{Character |image = Jentorra.jpg |real name = Jentorra |gender = Female |affiliation = [[Freedom Fighters]] |movie = ''[[Ant-Man and the Wasp: Quantumania]]'' |actor = [[Katy M. O'Brian]] |status = Alive}} {{Quote|[[Quantum Realm|This]] is our home. Let's take it back!|Jentorra|Ant-Man and the Wasp: Quantumania}} '''Jentorra''' is the leader of the [[Freedom Fighters]] in the [[Quantum Realm]]. ==Biography== {{MD|Jentorra (Earth-199999)}} ===Early Life=== Jentorra was a resident of the [[Quantum Realm]] who grew furious with the rule of [[Kang the Conqueror]] in [[Axia]], as Jentorra’s home was destroyed by Kang where built his empire, displacing many inhabitants of the Quantum Realm and ruling the realm with an iron fist. Jentorra decided to revolt and eventually became the leader of the [[Freedom Fighters]]. However, she grew to dislike the former Freedom Fighter member, [[Janet van Dyne]], as she was a [[Human]].{{Ref|AMatWQ}} ===Freedom Fighters=== ====Meeting Scott Lang==== {{Quote|You come from [[Earth|above]]... like him. So, he's going to hunt you. He will burn the world to find you."
"Who?"
"[[Kang the Conqueror|The Conqueror]].|Jentorra and [[Cassie Lang]]|Ant-Man and the Wasp: Quantumania}} [[File:Jentorra of the QR.png|{{AltFloat}}|Jentorra meets [[Scott Lang|Scott]] and [[Cassie Lang]]]] One day, Jentorra was brought two people to her by [[Xolum]]. These people were [[Scott Lang|Scott]] and [[Cassie Lang]]. Once [[Veb]] gave them his [[Ooze]], Jentorra had [[Quaz]] talk to the two [[Humans]]. Scott and Cassie claimed to not know what was going on; Quaz confirmed this fact. She was very distrusting of the Langs as they were Humans, meaning [[Kang the Conqueror]] could be looking for them. On top of this, they were allies of van Dyne. Quaz continued to assure her they were truthful.{{Ref|AMatWQ}} ====Ambush on the Freedom Fighters==== Suddenly, the group heard commotion. The [[Quantumnauts]] had tracked their location and arrived, leading an attack. Jentorra angrily remarked that this was [[Scott Lang|Scott]] and [[Cassie Lang]]'s fault before yelling for everyone to get to the ships. Jentorra helped [[Xolum]] break free as Scott suited up into his [[Ant-Man Suit]]. As they fought some more, a ship was taken down, leading to [[Veb]] and [[Quaz]]'s capturing. Jentorra continued to fight, using her staff until [[Derrick]] was attacked by [[M.O.D.O.K.]]. Although she knew her chances were slim now that M.O.D.O.K. arrived, Jentorra fought anyways until she was finally defeated and captured. She was then cuffed and brought to the [[Celestium]] where she stayed in her own prison, guarded by Quantumnauts.{{Ref|AMatWQ}} ====[[Uprising in Axia|A New Chance]]==== Jentorra sat in her cell alone until she suddenly saw a tiny speck on the ground. She looked closely only to be startled by [[Cassie Lang]], who enlarged herself in front of Jentorra. Cassie apologized and remarked that that must have been frightening for Jentorra. Cassie then fought some [[Quantumnauts]] and used their face to open the cell, breaking Jentorra out. The two women made it to the control room where they tried to set up a communication screen to all of [[Axia]]. This was essential as just outside, [[Ant-Man]] and the [[Wasp]] were leading an attack. Cassie was able to load up the comms and remarked that she was on air. Although Cassie expected Jentorra to speak, Jentorra left the room to fight, leading Cassie to call on all of Axia to start a revolt. Jentorra made her way to the battle area and regained her staff from [[Xolum]] so they could fight. The [[Freedom Fighters]] started running as Jentorra lead a battle cry. However, [[Veb]] strayed too far in front and was obliterated by Quantumnauts. Luckily, this helped him figure out that with holes, he could create vacuum suctioning powers to suck in enemies. This confused both [[Quaz]] and Jentorra. The fighters moved on as Jentorra fought with Xolum.{{Ref|AMatWQ}} ====Retaking Her Home==== Suddenly, [[Kang the Conqueror]] had enough of the rebellion and decided to take matters into his own hands. He descended from his throne room on a platform, reached the battlefield on the ground and killed many members of the Freedom Fighters with ease, forcing Jentorra and her fellow comrades to fall back. Jentorra angrily threw her spear at great speeds towards Kang, but the latter was able to freeze it still, rendering Jentorra’s attack futile. As Xolum projected a energy beam towards Kang, he instead redirected the beam towards Xolum, leading to his head being obliterated. Jentorra looked at Xolum in sadness as Quaz pulled her away, advising them to retreat. However, Jentorra could not stand to leave her deceased friend. Eventually, Ant-Man and the Wasp were able to defeat Kang along with [[Hank Pym]], [[Janet van Dyne]], and a rebellious [[M.O.D.O.K.]] As the fighters realized Kang was defeated, they rejoiced and celebrated, having finally taken control back.{{Ref|AMatWQ}} ==Abilities== *'''Master Combatant''': ''To be added'' *'''Staff Mastery''': ''To be added'' *'''Expert Tactician''': ''To be added'' ==Equipment== ''To be added'' ==Relationships== {{Col-begin}}{{Col-2}} ===Allies=== *[[Freedom Fighters]] **[[Quaz]] **[[Xolum]] † **[[Veb]] **[[Derrick]] **[[Furry Face]] *[[Broccoli Man]] *[[Janet van Dyne]] *[[Ant-Man|Scott Lang/Ant-Man]] *[[Cassie Lang]] *[[Wasp|Hope van Dyne/Wasp]] *[[Hank Pym]] *[[Ants]] {{Col-2}} ===Enemies=== *[[Kang's Empire]] **[[Kang the Conqueror]] † - Attempted Killer **[[M.O.D.O.K.|Darren Cross/M.O.D.O.K.]] † **[[Quantumnauts]] {{Col-end}} ==Trivia== *In the comics, Jentorra is the niece of Queen Jarella, leader of the planet K'ai. ==Behind the Scenes== *When auditioning for Jentorra, [[Katy M. O'Brian]] thought at first that she was auditioning for a role in ''[[The Marvels]]'' due to all the female crewmembers surrounding her before being informed by [[Peyton Reed]] that the film was ''[[Ant-Man and the Wasp: Quantumania]]''. Due to the original character not being well-known in the source material, M. O'Brian was given freedom to develop her own backstory and interpretation of Jentorra.[https://www.inverse.com/entertainment/ant-man-quantumania-star-katy-obrian-interview-love-lies-bleeding ''Quantumania'' Star Katy O'Brian Thought She Was Auditioning for ''The Marvels''] *[[Nilly Cetin]] was a stunt double for [[Katy M. O'Brian]] in the role of Jentorra. *[[Frances Katz]] was a stand-in for [[Katy M. O'Brian]] in the role of Jentorra. ==References== {{Gallery|Jentorra/Gallery}} {{Reflist}} ==External Links== *{{Marvel}} *{{Marvel.com|characters/jentorra}} [[es:Jentorra]] [[pt-br:Jentorra]] [[ru:Дженторра]] [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:Ant-Man and the Wasp: Quantumania Characters]] [[Category:Unknown Race]] [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Brown Hair]] [[Category:Brown Eyes]] [[Category:Freedom Fighters Members]] [[Category:Freedom Fighters Leaders]]
